scope.policy: Only existing datasets and already-integrated methods are in scope. Complex, slow, dependency-heavy, or new-method cells are explicit null records.

status_labels.done: Numeric result exists in the shared comparison schema or report.
status_labels.partial: Comparable RRE/RTE/pose exists, but at least one field such as Chamfer is unavailable.
status_labels.null: Intentionally empty under the skip policy.
status_labels.smoke: Runnable path/schema check, not a converged result.

modelnet40_source2_crop.primary_result: done full-set converged result remains the main ModelNet evidence

smoke_result.note: 3-epoch short retrain, 20 batches with groups_per_batch=2; not a converged replacement.
